spanGrp.span: And naturally the coffee customs differ from the women to the men right?
No, they are the same thing
Firstly, the coffee is served with sweets, and dates with some sweets, and then comes the tea
Bring the coffee ##
With the #, with the faṭāyir, with the...
Who brings the coffee?
Us, the family members
They pour it, if for example we have male guests right now, there would be our sons and they pour the coffee
If there is a big party or a wedding, we would hire workers
People who would pour it and dress up appropriately
# they are specialised in this sort of thing
The people have changed, it's not like before
Right
Before they would make a big fire outside
And they would put on it a lot of coffee pots and the men would pour it, there weren't any workers
Now no, it has developed, life has changed
It became nicer and better
I swear, it became better, everything became easy and more comfortable, everything is easy, thank God
The most important thing # when serving coffee, is that it is done with the right hand
(I'm referring to) the cup, right?
The right hand is the better one, # it is the preferred hand and the better one, right
If someone is served coffee with the left hand, in order to excuse himself, the coffee server must say ##
# The one receiving the coffee would then say "your right hand is just like your left hand" or "your left hand is as (honourable) as your right hand" ((check translation))
By way of apology, it's as if he is apologising
This is empty, # the pretty coffee pots, this would be on its inside
What she is saying is... right
They are lovely
There are a number of forms, and each form symbolises its country
For example this is the Iraqi one, the decorated one
And this is the Arabian kind
Most of the decorated and # ones are from the people of the north, from Iraq, and the ones like this are from Arabia, from the Najd
Is there also typical Kuwaiti form?
There is!
There is the Kuwaiti kind, although it could also be imported
Or they would make it, or they copy the ones from Baghdad or the ones from Yemen
Or the Arabian kind, that's it
